timeline.label: Ceremony
timeline.description: Join us under the arbor as we exchange our vows

timeline.label: Cocktail Hour
timeline.description: Hors d'oeuvres and drinks in the garden courtyard

timeline.label: Reception
timeline.description: Dinner, toasts, and dancing under the stars

transport.car: The New York Botanical Garden is located at 2900 Southern Blvd, Bronx, NY. There are several parking garages nearby.
transport.train: Metro-North Railroad from Grand Central to Botanical Garden Station. The journey takes approximately 20 minutes.
transport.subway: Take the 2 or 5 train to Pelham Parkway station, then a short taxi or bus ride to the garden.

faqs.a: Details about attire will be shared closer to the date. Stay tuned!
The ceremony begins promptly at 6:30 PM. We recommend arriving at least 15 minutes early to find your seat.
Yes, there is parking available at the New York Botanical Garden. We recommend arriving early as spots fill up.
Absolutely! We will have a variety of dietary options available.

faqs.q: What is the dress code for the India wedding?
faqs.a: Traditional Indian attire is encouraged but not required. More details to come.

faqs.q: When will the India wedding details be announced?
faqs.a: We will share the date and venue details for the India celebration as soon as they are confirmed.
